channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Kambamura declares war on gold and lithium smugglers @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe’s Mines and Mining Development Minister, Polite Kambamura, has vowed to intensify the fight against the illicit export of gold, lithium and diamonds, warning that the government will relentle... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Collins Mnangagwa renovates dilapidated Mbare flats @bulawayo24
item.description: Engineer Collins Takunda Mnangagwa has launched a major renovation programme at the rundown Matapi Flats in Mbare, Harare, in what is being presented as the first phase of a broader initiative to reha... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe banks poised to cut ZiG lending rates @bulawayo24 @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: Zimbabwean banks are expected to gradually reduce lending rates following the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe’s decision to cut the Bank Policy Rate from 35 percent to 30 percent, a move aimed at aligning bo... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Bajila apologises for missing crucial CAB 3 vote @bulawayo24
item.description: Citizens Coalition for Change (CCC) legislator for Emakhandeni-Luveve, Collins Bajila, has issued an open letter to his constituents explaining how he missed last week’s decisive vote on the Constitut... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Mnangagwa declares Matemadanda national hero @bulawayo24
item.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa has declared the late Victor Matemadanda a national hero, describing him as a committed liberation war veteran, politician and diplomat who dedicated his life to the servi... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: CAB 3 heads to Senate as Zanu-PF eyes swift passage @bulawayo24 @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Debate on the controversial Constitutional Amendment No. 3 Bill is expected to begin in the Senate today, with Government expressing confidence that the proposed legislation will sail through the Uppe... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: China hails Zimbabwe’s investment climate @bulawayo24
item.description: China has commended Zimbabwe for maintaining what it described as an attractive, transparent and predictable business environment, as the two countries seek to deepen economic cooperation and expand i... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: President Mnangagwa Declares Ambassador Victor Matemadanda a National Hero
item.description: President Mnangagwa Declares Ambassador Victor Matemadanda a National Hero President Emmerson Mnangagwa has declared Zimbabwe’s Ambassador to Mozambique and Eswatini, Victor Matemadanda, a National Hero following his death on Saturday at the age of 66. In a condolence message to the bereaved family, President Mnangagwa said he received news of the veteran liberation fighter’s passing [...] The post President Mnangagwa Declares Ambassador Victor Matemadanda a National Hero appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Government hits back at Khama over ‘power hungry’ Mnangagwa remarks

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
